popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Robert Lathrop
popularStory.description: Robert Lowthroppe was born about 1511 in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England.  He was the son of John Lathrop and Alice Margaret Wade.  The Lowthroppes were a prominent and wealthy family in Yorkshir …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lowthrop於1513年出生在英國越可爾傑利 伯頓時，他的父親John Lowthroppe33歲，母親Margaret35歲。他於大約1535年與Ellen在英國越可爾傑利 伯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年10月20日在他的家鄉享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lowthrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Lowthorpe
meanings: English: locative name from Lowthorpe (ER Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lowthrop was born in 1513, in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Lowthroppe, was 33 and his mother, Margaret, was 35. He married Ellen about 1535, in Cherry Burton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 October 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

Il a épousé Ellen environ 1535, à Cherry Burton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lowthrop(이)가 1513년 영국 요르크실르 처리 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lowthroppe(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1535년 영국 요르크실르 처리 버턴에서 Ellen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 10월 20일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lowthrop родился в 1513 г. в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lowthroppe было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen около 1535 г. в местности чирри буртон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 октября 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.
